description_for_human: AI tool risk assessment for schools — checks existing assessments, saves results to the Approved Tools Registry, and looks up independent vendor privacy ratings.

functions.name: getAssessment
functions.description: Retrieve an existing risk assessment for an AI tool from the school's Approved Tools Registry. Call this at the start of every assessment conversation to check whether a prior assessment exists.

toolName.description: The name of the AI tool to look up (e.g. 'ChatGPT', 'Grammarly', 'Canva')

functions.name: saveAssessment
functions.description: Save a completed risk assessment to the school's Approved Tools Registry. Call this after completing the 5-dimension scoring and producing the final recommendation.

toolName.description: The name of the AI tool

vendorName.description: The name of the vendor or company

toolType.description: Category of tool (e.g. AI chatbot, adaptive learning, content generation, productivity, assessment tool)

ageGroup.description: Age group of students who will use this tool (e.g. KS3, KS4, 16-18, all ages)

riskRating.description: Overall risk rating based on total score

totalScore.description: Total score out of 25 (sum of 5 dimension scores)

reviewDate.description: Date by which this assessment should be reviewed (ISO 8601 format)

aupClause.description: Suggested Acceptable Use Policy clause for approved tools

notes.description: Any additional notes, caveats, or conditions attached to the decision

functions.name: vendorLookup
functions.description: Look up an AI tool's independent privacy rating from the Common Sense Media EdTech Privacy database. Returns a privacy grade, data collection summary, and whether the tool is safe for use with children.

toolName.description: The name of the AI tool or EdTech product to look up (e.g. 'ChatGPT', 'Grammarly', 'Duolingo')
